title: SafeWorldBorder
description: Keep world borders safe when you're inside and log out.
body:
Worldborder Plugin

A simple, lightweight plugin to easily manage world borders. No commands, no dependencies—just drop it in and it works. It’s efficient and won’t impact server performance, providing hassle-free border protection. Perfect for anyone looking for a straightforward solution!

Spoiler

Players can freely leave the world border area, but if they go beyond the boundary, the plugin will automatically teleport them back inside the borders. This ensures that no player can permanently go outside the protected area, keeping the world safe and contained. No commands or configuration needed—just install and enjoy!
